scripts.start:all: npm run start:infra && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,frontend,desktop --prefix-colors blue,magenta,green "npm run start:api" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:desktop"
scripts.start:web: npm run start:infra && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,frontend --prefix-colors blue,magenta "npm run start:api" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.stop:all: npm run stop:processes && npm run stop:infra
scripts.start:frontend: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names frontend,browser --prefix-colors magenta,cyan "npm run start:frontend:server" "npm run open:frontend"
scripts.lint:fix: npm run format && npm --prefix frontend run lint:fix && npm run lint
scripts.verify: ./mvnw clean verify && npm --prefix frontend run verify && docker compose config
